mapper.select: select id, document_id, member_id, member_name, member_role, created_at, updated_at from collaborative_document_member where document_id = #{documentId} order by created_at asc, id asc
mapper.insert: insert into collaborative_document_member ( document_id, member_id, member_name, member_role, created_at, updated_at ) values ( #{documentId}, #{memberId}, #{memberName}, #{memberRole}, #{updatedAt}, #{updatedAt} ) on duplicate key update member_name = values(member_name), member_role = values(member_role), updated_at = values(updated_at)
